text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(What did you think of the business plan I sent
you the other day?)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(If you found anything lacking, please let me
know.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay, sent. What else did I need to check?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh? How is it already— Oh, I've done it again... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has accidentally stayed up all
night after getting too caught up in her work.
